messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The NeedsApproval message shows the terminal's input box and footer, not the question — strip VISIBLE chrome
What it solves: WHAT THE HUMAN SAW (his screenshot, BL-359-shaped NeedsApproval on Telegram). The message body was:
a prompt line, then a wall of `────` box-rule separators, an unrenderable `▯▯` glyph, then
`bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · ← for agents`. That is the Claude Code TUI's input
box and per…
How it works: The input-box border rules are excluded from the snippet

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-395 - The NeedsApproval message shows the terminal's input box and footer, not the question — strip VISIBLE chrome is complete.
